name: Salami Pizza Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the half and half, oregano, garlic powder, and eggs.
2. Place the mixture in the unbaked pastry crust.
3. Add the minced salami and 1 1/2 cups of Mozzarella cheese on top of the egg mixture.
4. Pour the remaining Mozzarella over the top.
5. Bake at 375 degrees for 40 minutes.
6. Spoon hot pizza sauce over each serving.
7. Serves 4 to 6.
